title: Call Logs
lede: Every call your AI agents make or receive is recorded here. Use Call Logs to see who called, which agent handled it, how long it lasted, how it ended, and what it cost.

steps.title: Open Call Logs
steps.content:
1. In the left menu, go to Call Center → Call Logs.
  2. The table lists calls newest-first. A small arrow next to each date shows direction — up/green for outbound, down/red for inbound.

images.caption: Call Center → Call Logs shows every inbound and outbound call.
Call Center → Call Logs shows every inbound and outbound call.

steps.title: Read the columns
steps.content:
Each row summarizes one call:

  • Date & Direction — when the call happened and whether it was inbound or outbound.
  • From / To — the two phone numbers on the call.
  • Duration — how long the call lasted.
  • AI Agent — which agent handled it.
  • Campaign — the campaign the call belonged to, if any.
  • Related Entities — the matched Contact or Lead in your CRM.
  • Ended Reason — why the call ended (customer hung up, agent ended, silence timeout, etc.).
  • Cost — the billed amount for that call.

steps.title: Open a call for full detail
steps.content:
1. Click a row to open the call's details.
  2. Review the full transcript, per-leg breakdown, and any recording captured for that call.
  3. Use this to check how an agent handled a specific conversation or to troubleshoot a call that ended early.

steps.title: Filter and find calls
steps.content:
1. Sort by any column header (date, duration, cost, and more).
  2. Narrow the list by agent, campaign, direction, or date range to find the calls you care about.
  3. Open a linked Contact or Lead straight from the row to see that person's full history.
